titleStmt.title: SII 40.311: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 311. (A.R. No. B. 357 of 1933.) Chinnakomarla, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone standing in the compound of the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Kārttīka, śu. 12, Utthāna-dvādaśi, corresponding to 1533 A.D., October 29, Wednesday.

Records the gift of land at Komerla in Gaṇḍikōṭa-sīma to the god Chennakēśava by Timmarusu of Parāśara-gōtra and Āpastamba-sūtra. The gift was made in the holy presence of god Narasiṁha on the bank of the river Pinākini (i.e., the Pennar), on the occasion of utthāna-dvādasi. Komerla is stated to have been granted to the donor as nāyaṅkara by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī jayādbhudaya śā
livāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1455 Agu
nēṭi vijaya saṁvatsara kārtika śu 12 lu śrī
madrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapra
tāpa śrī vīra Accutayadēvamahārāyalu vajrasiṁhā
sanārūḍhulai pṛthivi sāṁbrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu ciṁtanakomerla
ceṁnnakēśavaperumāḷladēvara śrīkāra ma parāśa
ragōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśśākhādhyāyulai
na bhāvayagāri pautṛlunu śrīrāmayagāri putṛlaina
tiṁmarusayyagāru Anaṁtamulaina daṁḍamulu samarpiṁci I
cina bhūdānadharmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu svāmi Accu
tarāyamahārāyalu mānāyaṁkarānaku pāli
ṁciyiyyavadhariṁcina gaṁḍikōṭa sīmalō celle kome
lagrāmamaṁdu grāmānaku vuku tūrppuku gu
ṁḍlakuṁṭa polamēra dakṣiṇaṁ kṣētramē pōlamēra paḍuma
ṭi ceruvu kaṭṭamēra vuttarāna gumaguṁḍaṁ polamērayi
catussīmakuṁnulōnu peṁgalakṣētraṁ kha 12 Akṣarā
lānu paṁḍreṁḍu puṭla kṣētramunnu tathātithi vuddhā
nadvādasi puṇyakālamaṁdu pinākinī nadītīramaṁdu lō
kapāvana śrīnarasiṁhvadēvuni saṁnnidhiki sahiraṇyōdaka
dānadhārāpūrvakagānu dhārapōsi Istimigāna Iṁ
duku celle nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Āgāmi
siddhasvāmyaṁbula Asiri ja svāmya
bululōnugānu kṣētramu
ṁnnu dhārapōsi Istimigā vaccina pala
ṁ Amṛtapaḷlaku trivācakaṁgānu samarpiṁci I
stimigāna Āragiṁpu Aṁga pālu A
vadhariṁcceḍidi . dānapālanayō
yēnupalanaṁ dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanā
dacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 40.311 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
